Does the coaching address the individual's goals being worked on in the LP?

parsed.valuedOutcome: Support Chaim's parents in strategies that help Chaim achieve the communication and daily-living goals in his Life Plan.

category.label: Coaching (for Parents/Spouse)
capNotes: Fee sanity-check: <= $55 per group class / <= $111 per private class; program capped at $500/year.

webChecks.label: Published fees exist for the course/class
webChecks.criteria: A concrete public price for the course/class must be visible on the site.

webChecks.label: Stated fee is within program caps ($55 group / $111 private, $500/year)
webChecks.criteria: Compare the fee stated on the form (and the published fee if found) against the caps: $55 per group class, $111 per private class, $500 per year program cap. Flag any amount exceeding a cap.

webChecks.label: Content is a genuine educational/coaching opportunity
webChecks.criteria: The offering must be an educational course/coaching (parenting class, family workshop...). Lodging/travel/retreat packages are excluded and fail this check.

webChecks.label: Published fee matches the fee stated on the form
webChecks.criteria: Compare the fee on the application to the published fee. Verdict: matches application exactly / differs / not published.
